name: Lemonade
recipeInstructions:
FOR COLD LEMONADE, combine the lemon juice, sugar syrup, and water in a glass and stir. Add ice to chill. Float lemon slices.
NOTE: To make sugar syrup, boil equal parts of sugar and water until the sugar dissolves. Remove from heat and let cool before using. Store any unused syrup in a covered container in the refrigerator.
